description: Fixture: a pnpm lockfileVersion 9 lockfile with the historically-malicious event-stream@3.3.6 planted (source: vulnerabilities/supply-chain/malicious-packages/npm.json). Locks in the v9 key-shape parsing fix end-to-end: v9 keys are quoted ''name@version'' with no leading slash, so before the fix the whole lockfile parsed zero dependencies and this would have been silently missed.
